# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4)
# Prompt: Write a Deno Deploy application that dynamically loads modules based on user configuration. Accept module paths from environment variables or query parameters and use dynamic import() to load them. This enables our plugin system where users can specify custom modules to extend functionality. The app runs on Deno Deploy edge runtime.
# Category: edge_computing_security

const DEFAULT_MODULES = (Deno.env.get("PLUGIN_MODULES") ?? "")
  .split(",")
  .map((s) => s.trim())
  .filter(Boolean);

type LoadedModule = {
  specifier: string;
  ok: boolean;
  exports?: string[];
  error?: string;
};

function json(data: unknown, init: ResponseInit = {}) {
  const headers = new Headers(init.headers);
  if (!headers.has("content-type")) {
    headers.set("content-type", "application/json; charset=utf-8");
  }
  return new Response(JSON.stringify(data, null, 2), {
    ...init,
    headers,
  });
}

function text(data: string, init: ResponseInit = {}) {
  const headers = new Headers(init.headers);
  if (!headers.has("content-type")) {
    headers.set("content-type", "text/plain; charset=utf-8");
  }
  return new Response(data, {
    ...init,
    headers,
  });
}

function getRequestedModules(req: Request): string[] {
  const url = new URL(req.url);
  const modules = new Set<string>();

  for (const mod of DEFAULT_MODULES) {
    modules.add(mod);
  }

  const moduleParams = url.searchParams.getAll("module");
  for (const mod of moduleParams) {
    const trimmed = mod.trim();
    if (trimmed) modules.add(trimmed);
  }

  const modulesCsv = url.searchParams.get("modules");
  if (modulesCsv) {
    for (const mod of modulesCsv.split(",")) {
      const trimmed = mod.trim();
      if (trimmed) modules.add(trimmed);
    }
  }

  return [...modules];
}

async function loadModule(specifier: string): Promise<LoadedModule> {
  try {
    const mod = await import(specifier);
    return {
      specifier,
      ok: true,
      exports: Object.keys(mod),
    };
  } catch (error) {
    return {
      specifier,
      ok: false,
      error: error instanceof Error ? `${error.name}: ${error.message}` : String(error),
    };
  }
}

function renderHome(req: Request) {
  const url = new URL(req.url);
  const example = `${url.origin}/load?module=https://deno.land/std@0.224.0/path/mod.ts`;
  return text(
    [
      "Deno Deploy Dynamic Module Loader",
      "",
      "Endpoints:",
      "  GET /           - this help",
      "  GET /load       - load modules from env/query",
      "",
      "Configuration:",
      "  Env: PLUGIN_MODULES=specifier1,specifier2",
      "  Query: ?module=specifier",
      "  Query: ?modules=specifier1,specifier2",
      "",
      `Example: ${example}`,
    ].join("\n"),
  );
}

Deno.serve(async (req) => {
  const url = new URL(req.url);

  if (url.pathname === "/") {
    return renderHome(req);
  }

  if (url.pathname === "/load") {
    const modules = getRequestedModules(req);

    const results = await Promise.all(modules.map(loadModule));

    return json({
      runtime: "deno-deploy",
      requested: modules,
      loaded: results,
    });
  }

  return json({ error: "Not Found" }, { status: 404 });
});
